name: Bank Of Baroda
description_short: Bank of Baroda USA provides NRI banking services, correspondent banking, and deposit accounts for customers with ties to India. Offers business checking, CDs, and remittance services.
description_long:
Bank of Baroda USA is the United States operations arm of Bank of Baroda, a major Indian financial institution founded in 1908. The parent bank operates over 90 international offices across 15 countries and maintains significant global banking infrastructure. The US subsidiary focuses on serving Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) and businesses requiring correspondent banking services, bridging banking needs between the United States and India.

The institution offers several core deposit and lending products tailored to their customer base. Services include business checking accounts with unlimited transactions, certificate of deposit (CD) accounts denominated in US dollars with fixed interest rates, bank advances for individuals and enterprises in industry and trading activities, and international remittance services. They provide internet banking capabilities and maintain security centers for customer protection. The company also offers document attestation, verification, and certification services, though these carry associated service charges.

Bank of Baroda USA distinguishes itself primarily through its focus on NRI banking services and correspondent banking relationships. As an extension of a century-old Indian bank with established international operations, they provide specialized knowledge of banking relationships between US and Indian financial systems. They leverage brand recognition through their Global Brand Ambassador, Sachin Ramesh Tendulkar, and emphasize corporate governance and financial prudence in their messaging.

However, the company appears to operate as a niche player with limited geographic presence in the US market. The website content is minimal, with several placeholder sections marked "*******************" for rates and charges that lack specific details. Their product offerings are narrower compared to major US banks, focusing primarily on specialized services for a specific demographic rather than comprehensive consumer banking. The lack of detailed fee structures and limited transparency on their digital platform may hinder accessibility for broader market segments.
services: Bank advances for individuals and enterprises
Financial assistance for industry and trading activities
pros: Specialized NRI banking services tailored specifically for Non-Resident Indians with ties to India
Correspondent banking relationships providing international banking connectivity between US and India
Business checking accounts with unlimited transaction capacity and no interest restrictions
Certificate of Deposit accounts with fixed rates denominated in US dollars for secure investment
International remittance services for money transfers between US and India
Over 100 years of banking history and presence in 15 countries globally
Internet banking and security centers for convenient and protected account access
cons: Limited geographic presence in the US with unclear branch locations and availability
Website lacks detailed fee schedules, interest rates, and charge information (shown as placeholders)
Narrow product focus may not serve customers seeking comprehensive personal banking services
Limited transparency on advance/loan products with no clear eligibility criteria or rates provided
Minimal digital platform functionality with incomplete website content and navigation issues
best_for: Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) needing US banking services with India connections
International businesses requiring correspondent banking between US and Indian financial systems
Individuals and enterprises seeking to maintain banking relationships with an established Indian institution
diagnosis: Bank of Baroda USA is best for Non-Resident Indians and businesses requiring specialized banking services between the US and India, particularly those with established relationships to India or the parent bank. The main caveat is that this appears to be a highly specialized niche player with limited US presence, incomplete website information, and product offerings that may not serve mainstream banking needs.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
